title: fr-audit input envelope
description: Input contract for cuo/cpo/fr-audit. Accepts one or more existing FR markdown paths (any source). Optional upstream_context enables STALE-001 enforcement and manifest write-back when chained from fr-author.
_note: rubric_version, upstream_context, trace_id, caller_persona, max_iterations_per_fr are optional with documented defaults. Aligned with SKILL.md frontmatter expects.required_fields + expects.optional_fields per registry v0.2.1 audit.

fr_paths.description: FR markdown paths to audit. Each gets a sibling .audit.md.

rubric_version.description: Pinned to the version in this folder's RUBRIC.md. Older rubric versions produce advisory-only reports.

caller_persona.description: Persona ID of the caller. Defaults to cuo-cpo when invoked directly.

trace_id.description: UUID for genie.action_log correlation. Auto-generated if omitted.

manifest_path.description: Path to the upstream skill's state file. Required when from_skill == cuo/cpo/fr-author for STALE-001 enforcement.

upstream_context.description: Optional. Set by the supervisor when chaining (e.g. from fr-author). Enables STALE-001 enforcement and manifest write-back.
